intro: Halimium lasianthum, also known as Rock Rose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The bioactive constituents of Halimium lasianthum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical preparations, such as creams and salves, to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
